label: plain_text
text:
15. A contract on construction job
specifies a p
penalty f
for delay of completion
n beyond
a
certain date as follows:  200 for the first day,  250 for the second day, ? 300 for the third
day, etc., the penalty for each succeeding day being ? 50 more than for the preceding day.
How much money t
the contractor has to pay as penalty, if he has delayed the work by 30
days?
